content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_MainERP_Item
-- drop view v_MainERP_Item
as
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO as        [Item Number]
,               ITDS as                 [Item Name]
,               'M3' as                 [Main ERP]
,               ITCL as                 [Brand Short Name]
,               STAT as                 [Status]
FROM            M3.MITMAS

/*
UNION

SELECT          DISTINCT ID as          [Item Number]
,                DESCRIPTION as         [Item Name]
,               'Visual' AS             [Main ERP]
,               USER_1 AS               [Brand Short Name]
FROM            ECM.PART
WHERE           ID NOT IN
(
    SELECT      DISTINCT ITNO
    FROM        M3.MITMAS

    UNION

    SELECT      DISTINCT ITNE
    FROM        M3.MITMAS
)

UNION

SELECT          DISTINCT StockCode as          [Item Number]
,                Description as         [Item Name]
,               'Syspro G' AS             [Main ERP]
,               ProductClass AS               [Brand Short Name]
FROM            SCG.InvMaster
WHERE           StockCode NOT IN
(
    SELECT      DISTINCT ITNO
    FROM        M3.MITMAS

    UNION

    SELECT      DISTINCT ITNE
    FROM        M3.MITMAS

    UNION

    SELECT      distinct ID
    FROM        ECM.PART
)
*/
